plan.analysis: Concurrency issues in job state updates lead to unexpected changes in job ownership and completion status.

contract_coverage.postcondition: The second worker should not be able to claim an active job, and the job state should remain unchanged.

```

SELECT

    p.length_value * p.width_value * p.height_value AS volume_cm3
FROM shipping_package AS p
WHERE p.package_id = :package_id;
=======
SELECT
    p.package_id,
    (p.length_value * conversion_factor_length) * (p.width_value * conversion_factor_width) * (p.height_value * conversion_factor_height) AS volume_cm3
FROM shipping_package AS p
JOIN length_unit AS lu ON p.length_unit_id = lu.unit_id AND p.width_unit_id = lu.unit_id AND p.height_unit_id = lu.unit_id
WHERE p.package_id = :package_id;
=======
```
